producer.tool: Ghidra OracleRefs, typed bulk corpus, and decompiler read

structuralValidation.method: Executable hash and PE timestamp matched the DFHack symbol table. Caller tracing separates the normal graphics renderer and its UNIT_STATUS selector/writer from the timed non-graphics chooser; threshold fields were corroborated against the matching df-structures layout.
